top3.sql:
SELECT m1.label AS molecule1, m2.label AS molecule2
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m1 ON a1.molecule_id = m1.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m2 ON a2.molecule_id = m2.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';

SELECT m1.label AS molecule1, m2.label AS molecule2
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m1 ON a1.molecule_id = m1.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m2 ON a2.molecule_id = m2.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';

SELECT m.label
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';

SELECT m1.label AS molecule1, m2.label AS molecule2
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m1 ON a1.molecule_id = m1.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m2 ON a2.molecule_id = m2.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';

SELECT m.label
FROM atom a1
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM atom a2
    WHERE a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4'
      AND a2.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
  );

SELECT m.label
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';

final.sql:
SELECT m1.label AS molecule1, m2.label AS molecule2
FROM atom a1
JOIN atom a2 ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m1 ON a1.molecule_id = m1.molecule_id
JOIN molecule m2 ON a2.molecule_id = m2.molecule_id
WHERE a1.atom_id = 'TR000_2' AND a2.atom_id = 'TR000_4';
